india_trends.title: Toyota Kirloskar Motor's total sales up 17 pc at 32,086 units in April
india_trends.summary: Toyota Kirloskar Motor witnessed a robust 17% surge in total sales for April 2026, reaching 32,086 units. Domestic sales climbed an impressive 21% to 30,159 units, showcasing strong market demand. While exports saw a dip of 23%, the company attributes its positive performance to customer focus and p

india_trends.summary: The ongoing conflict in West Asia could emerge as both a challenge and an opportunity for India, with global brokerage Morgan Stanley projecting a sharp rise in domestic investments across energy, defence, fertilisers and data infrastructure, even as the country grapples with elevated risks from oil

india_trends.title: JSW MG Motor India wholesales up 3% at 6,018 units in April
india_trends.summary: JSW MG Motor India saw a 3 percent rise in vehicle dispatches to dealers in April 2026. The company maintained strong sales for both its petrol and electric vehicle models. This growth occurred despite global supply chain issues and reduced consumer interest in the automotive sector. The company's p

Mumbai-Pune Missing Link to be inaugurated today; Maharashtra CM assures smooth ride
Stock market holiday: NSE and BSE to remain shut for 12 days in May 2026; check full list
india_trends.summary: The Indian stock market will be closed on Maharashtra Day and Bakri Id in May 2026, totalling 12 holidays. Trading halts include equity, derivatives, and currency segments. Key holidays like Diwali and Christmas will also see market closures, while Sensex and Nifty 50 fell amid rising oil prices.

india_trends.title: Penny stock under ₹5 to be in focus on Monday; here’s why
india_trends.summary: Penny stock under ₹5: Empower India share price has rallied 12% in one week, and has jumped by a whopping 97% in one month. The penny stock has gained 50% in three months, but has risen just 2% in six months. Empower India shares have surged 30% in one year.

india_trends.summary: Stock Market Today: Oil Prices Cross $110, FIIs Continue Selling    Analytics Insight

india_trends.title: From Rs 658 to Rs 3,000+: How commercial LPG cylinder prices skyrocketed since 2008
india_trends.summary: Commercial LPG prices have reached a record high, with a Rs 993 hike per 19-kg cylinder, bringing the total increase in three months to Rs 1,303. This surge is attributed to rising global energy prices amid the West Asia conflict. Domestic LPG prices, however, remain unchanged.

india_trends.title: Square Yards reports Rs 2,086 crore revenue in FY26, growth of 48% year-over-year
india_trends.summary: Real estate firm Square Yards has announced impressive financial results for FY26, with revenue soaring to Rs 2,086 crore, marking a 48% year-over-year increase. The company's EBITDA saw a significant jump of 3.7 times, reaching Rs 176 crore, as EBITDA margins expanded to 8%. India continues to be t

india_trends.title: Kia India sales up 16% at 27,286 units in April
india_trends.summary: Kia India achieved its highest-ever April sales in 2026. Wholesales grew 16 percent to 27,286 units. This performance highlights strong customer demand for Kia's vehicles. The new Kia Seltos, Sonet, and Carens are driving this growth. Kia India remains committed to the Indian market.

india_trends.title: IFCI unveils ESG PRAKRIT, a comprehensive ESG technology platform for banks and corporates
india_trends.summary: IFCI Limited has launched ESG PRAKRIT, a new technology platform. This platform offers comprehensive ESG assessment, reporting, and advisory services. It aims to help banks, financial institutions, and corporates improve their sustainability performance. The initiative supports climate risk prepared

india_trends.title: Indian bond yields end April near 7% as crude oil prices surge. What should investors do?
india_trends.summary: Global bond markets also faced pressure, with the 10-year US Treasury yield rising to a five-week high. This followed the US Federal Reserve’s most divided rate decision since 1992, which dampened expectations of near-term rate cuts as rising energy prices heightened inflation concerns.

india_trends.title: ​9 high-growth smallcap stocks surged up to 170%; 4 became multibaggers
india_trends.summary: BSE small-cap earnings showed strong momentum, with select companies delivering over 50% profit growth and sharp stock gains. A few standout performers combined earnings acceleration with multibagger returns, highlighting selective opportunities.

india_trends.title: RBI's ECL norms may cause up to 120 bps one-time hit for banks: Crisil
india_trends.summary: Reserve Bank of India's (RBI) proposed shift to an expected credit loss (ECL) framework could lead to a one-time net impact of up to 120 basis points (bps) on banks' Common Equity Tier-1 (CET-1) ratios, though the overall credit profiles of lenders are expected to remain stable says Crisil Ratings.

india_trends.title: Centre, states collect record ₹2.43 trillion in gross April GST revenue
india_trends.summary: Last April, the Centre and states had collected ₹2.37 trillion in GST revenue before adjusting for refunds, but the figures are not strictly comparable because of the GST cuts in September 2025.

india_trends.title: Apple bucks India’s smartphone slump with double-digit growth in March quarter; Cook ‘over the moon’
india_trends.summary: Outgoing CEO Tim Cook reports an 18th straight record quarter as the tech giant captures a 25% value share in the world's second-largest smartphone market.

india_trends.title: Lorna Hajdini sexual abuse case: JP Morgan colleagues call Chirayu Rana ‘socially awkward’, question claims
india_trends.summary: Chirayu Rana, a former JP Morgan employee, filed a sexual abuse case against Lorna Hajdini, describing her as socially awkward. Internal investigations found no evidence supporting his claims, and Rana sought a multi-million payout after alleging harassment and abuse of power.
